application.name: kedulz
application.description: kedulz is a comprehensive healthcare appointment booking platform that enables patients to book doctor appointments online instantly, manage family appointments, find doctors near them, and access digital prescriptions.

keyFeatures.description: Book doctor appointments online in seconds without phone calls or waiting
Find doctors and specialists near you based on location and specialty
Manage appointments for entire family from a single account
Get immediate confirmation when booking appointments
Receive push notifications and reminders for upcoming appointments
Access complete appointment and medical history anytime
Schedule appointments anytime, anywhere, 24 hours a day
View detailed doctor profiles, specializations, and availability
Reschedule or cancel appointments with just a few taps
Access and download digital prescriptions from your appointments
Quick booking via QR codes at clinics and hospitals
Get updates about appointment status, changes, and reminders

forPatients: Save time - no more phone calls or waiting on hold
Convenience - book appointments from anywhere, anytime
Family care - manage all family members' appointments in one place
Never miss appointments - automatic reminders and notifications
Complete history - access all past and upcoming appointments
Free to use - 100% free for patients with no hidden charges

steps.title: Search
steps.description: Search for doctors by specialty, location, or name

steps.title: Choose
steps.description: Select available appointment slots that fit your schedule

steps.title: Book
steps.description: Book your appointment instantly with just a few clicks

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Receive instant confirmation and appointment reminders

targetAudience: Seniors looking for easy-to-use appointment booking
Patients who want to avoid phone queues

useCases.solution: Search for general physicians near location, view available slots, book instantly

useCases.scenario: Parent needs to book pediatrician for child
useCases.solution: Add child as family member, search pediatricians, book appointment, get reminders
Search by specialty (cardiologist, dermatologist, etc.), filter by location, book appointment
View upcoming appointments, select appointment to reschedule, choose new time slot
Add parent as family member, book and manage all their appointments from your account

faq.question: What is kedulz?
faq.answer: kedulz is a comprehensive healthcare appointment booking platform that allows users to book doctor appointments online instantly. It helps patients find doctors near them, manage family appointments, receive reminders, and access digital prescriptions.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment on kedulz?
faq.answer: To book an appointment: 1) Search for doctors by specialty or location, 2) Choose available time slots, 3) Confirm your booking with just a few clicks, 4) Receive instant confirmation and reminders.

faq.question: Is kedulz free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, kedulz is 100% free for patients. You can book unlimited appointments, manage family members, and access all features without any charges.

faq.question: Can I manage appointments for my family members?
faq.answer: Yes, kedulz allows you to add and manage appointments for all your family members from a single account, making it convenient to handle healthcare for your entire family.

faq.question: What platforms is kedulz available on?
faq.answer: kedulz is available on iOS, Android smartphones, and as a web application. You can access it from any device with internet connectivity.

faq.question: How do I cancel or reschedule an appointment?
faq.answer: You can easily cancel or reschedule appointments directly from the kedulz. Go to your appointments list, select the appointment you want to modify, and choose either reschedule or cancel option.

faq.question: Do I get reminders for my appointments?
faq.answer: Yes, kedulz sends push notifications and reminders before your scheduled appointments to ensure you never miss them.

faq.question: Can I see my appointment history?
faq.answer: Yes, you can access your complete appointment history including past appointments, prescriptions, and medical records anytime from your profile.

faq.question: How do doctors join kedulz?
faq.answer: Doctors can register on kedulz, set up their profile with specialization and availability, and start accepting appointments from patients online.

faq.question: Is my medical information secure?
faq.answer: Yes, kedulz takes data security seriously and implements industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your medical information.
